output.root_cause: The GovTribe data ingest has not completed its scheduled hourly sync in the last 3 hours. The API endpoint is returning intermittent 503 errors, likely due to maintenance on GovTribe's side.
output.recommended_fix: Monitor GovTribe API status page for maintenance window updates. If the issue persists beyond 6 hours, switch to the backup SAM.gov direct feed for opportunity discovery. No operator action needed now — Sentinel will auto-retry.
